title: Arbiter [Library]
description: 👜 ⟢ A Datapack Library with blocks, tags, particles, crafting, and server utility!
body:
# ArbiterLib ⚙️
Arbiter is a **datapack library** with many features for making developing certain things more easy! The features aren't bound by a single thing, yet they work with eachother like cogs in front of an arbiter!
> This library is still in alpha. It will improve and its features are subject to change

> **Requires the resources to be installed!** (Install the datapack as a resource pack as well)

## Features ✨
- Built-in QOL like first-time greetings for server members and new worlds
- Debug commands for quick actions like applying y-motion, quick heads, instakills, etc.
- Particle shapes via macros for really easy 3d particle manipulation
- Player data storage, id bound, for storing and retrieving anything persistent
- Customizable ticking times set by server owners, grouped together by necessity of the action
- Custom block registry with its own standards and automatic lighting
- (upcoming) Crafting with 3 different modes, as well as custom smelting, brewing, etc.

## Afterwords
Check out the [GitHub](https://github.com/bluffcon/arbiterlib) and its readme for the full list of features and info on how to use them!
